topic.what: Insert pretrained SAE into transformer residual streams to defend against jailbreak attacks
topic.how: Sparse encode-decode bottleneck applied to activations during inference without modifying weights
topic.why_matters: SAE routing reduces jailbreak success rate by up to 5x and reduces cross-model transferability of adversarial suffixes

characteristics.what_it_measures: Jailbreak success rate under GCG attack
characteristics.context: Median ASR across 6 models (Gemma-2 2B/9B/27B, LLaMA-3 8B/70B, Mistral-7B)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Jailbreak success rate under BEAST attack
characteristics.context: Non-gradient beam-search attack with k1=k2=15, depth L=20

characteristics.what_it_measures: ASR of adversarial suffixes transferred between models
characteristics.context: 30 directed off-diagonal pairs per configuration, GCG attack

characteristics.what_itasures: Effect of L0 sparsity on BASE→SAE transfer ASR
characteristics.context: Sparser (lower L0) yields stronger robustness; 23× difference across sparsity range

characteristics.what_it_measures: Effect of SAE insertion layer on transfer ASR and clean behavior
characteristics.value: Layer 5: 0.9% (robust), Layer 35: 51.4% (weak); early layers affect clean behavior
characteristics.context: Early layers strongest robustness but perturb clean behavior; late layers ineffective

characteristics.what_it_measures: Cosine similarity between successive GCG optimization steps
Ratio of first to second singular value of gradient matrix
characteristics.context: Indicates gradient space contraction under SAE routing

characteristics.what_it_measures: Jaccard similarity of activated SAE features
characteristics.vs_baseline: Adversaries converge on shared sparse feature subspace
characteristics.context: Explains cross-model transferability of adversarial suffixes

not_for: Real-time systems with strict latency constraints
Black-box scenarios with limited evaluation protocol
Late-layer defense where early manipulation needed

novelty: First study of SAE robustness against adaptive white-box jailbreak attacks
Demonstrates representational bottleneck hypothesis for adversarial defense
Quantifies monotonic dose-response between sparsity and robustness
Analyzes cross-configuration transfer asymmetry between BASE and SAE models
Shows gradient stagnation and spectral concentration under SAE routing
